overall.description: A cinematic sequence from GTA V depicting a rainy night in Los Santos. The clip opens with a tracking shot along a neon-lit car wash facility, transitions through a runner passing by, then shifts to third-person perspective following Franklin walking down the rain-slicked urban sidewalk.

illuminated billboard displaying 'CAR WASH' in bright red letters
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights and street lamps
tall poles casting yellow-orange light through the heavy rain

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a cinematic tracking shot moving along a rain-drenched sidewalk at night. The Los Santos Car Wash dominates the right side with its distinctive zigzag roof and red neon signage, while wet pavement reflects the artificial lighting. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with heavy rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with utility poles and street furniture

events.description: pedestrian in dark jacket runs quickly from right to left across the frame

agents.ego_description: cinematic camera continues moving forward past the car wash entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing sprinting past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: wooden electrical pole with transformers and power lines
metal public waste bin on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the sidewalk as a pedestrian in dark clothing runs past from right to left. The car wash building recedes to the mid-ground while utility poles and street furniture become visible. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined commercial sidewalk with parked cars

events.description: camera switches from cinematic view to third-person perspective following Franklin in white tank top

agents.ego_description: Franklin walking steadily down the rain-soaked sidewalk, moving away from the camera

notable_agents.action: Franklin (protagonist) walking ahead of the camera down the sidewalk

cars parked along the street visible through the rain and mist
green industrial waste container on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person gameplay following Franklin walking down the sidewalk. The car wash building continues along the right while mature trees line the left side. Franklin walks steadily through the rain, passing a dumpster as the camera maintains a steady follow distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with traffic signals

events.description: pedestrian in blue plaid shirt walks past from left to right, crossing the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: Franklin continuing down the sidewalk toward the intersection, maintaining steady pace through the rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue plaid shirt walking past from left to right

entered.detail: illuminated traffic signals visible at the approaching intersection
lit storefronts and buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: Franklin continues walking toward an intersection as the street opens up ahead. A pedestrian in a blue plaid shirt passes by from the left. Traffic lights and additional commercial buildings become visible in the distance through the rainy night, while the car wash building remains a constant presence along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-drenched urban sidewalk that transitions from a cinematic tracking shot of a neon-lit facility into a third-person perspective following a character. It begins by gliding past the Los Santos Car Wash, where red neon signage and a zigzag roof reflect vividly off the wet pavement amidst heavy rainfall. As the camera continues forward, a pedestrian in dark clothing dashes across the frame, causing the car wash to recede into the mid-ground as utility poles and street furniture emerge from the gloom. The perspective then shifts to follow Franklin from behind as he walks steadily past mature trees and a dumpster, maintaining a constant distance through the downpour. Finally, the scene opens up toward a city intersection where another pedestrian passes by, revealing distant traffic lights and commercial buildings through the rainy night.
